name: No Bake Chocolate Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, stir together chocolate chips and butter until the chips melt.
2. Stir in sweetened condensed milk, 20 crushed graham crackers, half a cup of coconut, and half a cup of chopped nuts.
3. Drop spoonfuls onto wax paper.
(Note: This recipe is from my childhood and one my Mother still makes when we come home for Christmas!)
